# Port target: `eslint-plugin-regexp`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/ota-meshi/eslint-plugin-regexp |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-regexp` @ `v3.1.0` |
| Baseline npm version | `3.1.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 82 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `confusing-quantifier` | disallow confusing quantifiers | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/confusing-quantifier.html) |
| 2 | `control-character-escape` | enforce consistent escaping of control characters | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/control-character-escape.html) |
| 3 | `grapheme-string-literal` | enforce single grapheme in string literal | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/grapheme-string-literal.html) |
| 4 | `hexadecimal-escape` | enforce consistent usage of hexadecimal escape | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/hexadecimal-escape.html) |
| 5 | `letter-case` | enforce into your favorite case | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/letter-case.html) |
| 6 | `match-any` | enforce match any character style | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/match-any.html) |
| 7 | `negation` | enforce use of escapes on negation | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/negation.html) |
| 8 | `no-contradiction-with-assertion` | disallow elements that contradict assertions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-contradiction-with-assertion.html) |
| 9 | `no-control-character` | disallow control characters | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-control-character.html) |
| 10 | `no-dupe-characters-character-class` | disallow duplicate characters in the RegExp character class | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-dupe-characters-character-class.html) |
| 11 | `no-dupe-disjunctions` | disallow duplicate disjunctions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-dupe-disjunctions.html) |
| 12 | `no-empty-alternative` | disallow alternatives without elements | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-empty-alternative.html) |
| 13 | `no-empty-capturing-group` | disallow capturing group that captures empty. | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-empty-capturing-group.html) |
| 14 | `no-empty-character-class` | disallow character classes that match no characters | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-empty-character-class.html) |
| 15 | `no-empty-group` | disallow empty group | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-empty-group.html) |
| 16 | `no-empty-lookarounds-assertion` | disallow empty lookahead assertion or empty lookbehind assertion | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-empty-lookarounds-assertion.html) |
| 17 | `no-empty-string-literal` | disallow empty string literals in character classes | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-empty-string-literal.html) |
| 18 | `no-escape-backspace` | disallow escape backspace (`[\\b]`) | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-escape-backspace.html) |
| 19 | `no-extra-lookaround-assertions` | disallow unnecessary nested lookaround assertions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-extra-lookaround-assertions.html) |
| 20 | `no-invalid-regexp` | disallow invalid regular expression strings in `RegExp` constructors | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-invalid-regexp.html) |
| 21 | `no-invisible-character` | disallow invisible raw character | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-invisible-character.html) |
| 22 | `no-lazy-ends` | disallow lazy quantifiers at the end of an expression | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-lazy-ends.html) |
| 23 | `no-legacy-features` | disallow legacy RegExp features | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-legacy-features.html) |
| 24 | `no-misleading-capturing-group` | disallow capturing groups that do not behave as one would expect | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-misleading-capturing-group.html) |
| 25 | `no-misleading-unicode-character` | disallow multi-code-point characters in character classes and quantifiers | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-misleading-unicode-character.html) |
| 26 | `no-missing-g-flag` | disallow missing `g` flag in patterns used in `String#matchAll` and `String#replaceAll` | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-missing-g-flag.html) |
| 27 | `no-non-standard-flag` | disallow non-standard flags | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-non-standard-flag.html) |
| 28 | `no-obscure-range` | disallow obscure character ranges | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-obscure-range.html) |
| 29 | `no-octal` | disallow octal escape sequence | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-octal.html) |
| 30 | `no-optional-assertion` | disallow optional assertions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-optional-assertion.html) |
| 31 | `no-potentially-useless-backreference` | disallow backreferences that reference a group that might not be matched | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-potentially-useless-backreference.html) |
| 32 | `no-standalone-backslash` | disallow standalone backslashes (`\\`) | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-standalone-backslash.html) |
| 33 | `no-super-linear-backtracking` | disallow exponential and polynomial backtracking | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-super-linear-backtracking.html) |
| 34 | `no-super-linear-move` | disallow quantifiers that cause quadratic moves | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-super-linear-move.html) |
| 35 | `no-trivially-nested-assertion` | disallow trivially nested assertions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-trivially-nested-assertion.html) |
| 36 | `no-trivially-nested-quantifier` | disallow nested quantifiers that can be rewritten as one quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-trivially-nested-quantifier.html) |
| 37 | `no-unused-capturing-group` | disallow unused capturing group | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-unused-capturing-group.html) |
| 38 | `no-useless-assertions` | disallow assertions that are known to always accept (or reject) | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-assertions.html) |
| 39 | `no-useless-backreference` | disallow useless backreferences in regular expressions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-backreference.html) |
| 40 | `no-useless-character-class` | disallow character class with one character | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-character-class.html) |
| 41 | `no-useless-dollar-replacements` | disallow useless `$` replacements in replacement string | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-dollar-replacements.html) |
| 42 | `no-useless-escape` | disallow unnecessary escape characters in RegExp | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-escape.html) |
| 43 | `no-useless-flag` | disallow unnecessary regex flags | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-flag.html) |
| 44 | `no-useless-lazy` | disallow unnecessarily non-greedy quantifiers | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-lazy.html) |
| 45 | `no-useless-non-capturing-group` | disallow unnecessary non-capturing group | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-non-capturing-group.html) |
| 46 | `no-useless-quantifier` | disallow quantifiers that can be removed | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-quantifier.html) |
| 47 | `no-useless-range` | disallow unnecessary character ranges | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-range.html) |
| 48 | `no-useless-set-operand` | disallow unnecessary elements in expression character classes | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-set-operand.html) |
| 49 | `no-useless-string-literal` | disallow string disjunction of single characters in `\\q{...}` | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-string-literal.html) |
| 50 | `no-useless-two-nums-quantifier` | disallow unnecessary `{n,m}` quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-useless-two-nums-quantifier.html) |
| 51 | `no-zero-quantifier` | disallow quantifiers with a maximum of zero | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/no-zero-quantifier.html) |
| 52 | `optimal-lookaround-quantifier` | disallow the alternatives of lookarounds that end with a non-constant quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/optimal-lookaround-quantifier.html) |
| 53 | `optimal-quantifier-concatenation` | require optimal quantifiers for concatenated quantifiers | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/optimal-quantifier-concatenation.html) |
| 54 | `prefer-character-class` | enforce using character class | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-character-class.html) |
| 55 | `prefer-d` | enforce using `\\d` | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-d.html) |
| 56 | `prefer-escape-replacement-dollar-char` | enforces escape of replacement `$` character (`$$`). | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-escape-replacement-dollar-char.html) |
| 57 | `prefer-lookaround` | prefer lookarounds over capturing group that do not replace | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-lookaround.html) |
| 58 | `prefer-named-backreference` | enforce using named backreferences | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-named-backreference.html) |
| 59 | `prefer-named-capture-group` | enforce using named capture groups | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-named-capture-group.html) |
| 60 | `prefer-named-replacement` | enforce using named replacement | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-named-replacement.html) |
| 61 | `prefer-plus-quantifier` | enforce using `+` quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-plus-quantifier.html) |
| 62 | `prefer-predefined-assertion` | prefer predefined assertion over equivalent lookarounds | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-predefined-assertion.html) |
| 63 | `prefer-quantifier` | enforce using quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-quantifier.html) |
| 64 | `prefer-question-quantifier` | enforce using `?` quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-question-quantifier.html) |
| 65 | `prefer-range` | enforce using character class range | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-range.html) |
| 66 | `prefer-regexp-exec` | enforce that `RegExp#exec` is used instead of `String#match` if no global flag is provided | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-regexp-exec.html) |
| 67 | `prefer-regexp-test` | enforce that `RegExp#test` is used instead of `String#match` and `RegExp#exec` | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-regexp-test.html) |
| 68 | `prefer-result-array-groups` | enforce using result array `groups` | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-result-array-groups.html) |
| 69 | `prefer-set-operation` | prefer character class set operations instead of lookarounds | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-set-operation.html) |
| 70 | `prefer-star-quantifier` | enforce using `*` quantifier | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-star-quantifier.html) |
| 71 | `prefer-unicode-codepoint-escapes` | enforce use of unicode codepoint escapes | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-unicode-codepoint-escapes.html) |
| 72 | `prefer-w` | enforce using `\\w` | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/prefer-w.html) |
| 73 | `require-unicode-regexp` | enforce the use of the `u` flag | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/require-unicode-regexp.html) |
| 74 | `require-unicode-sets-regexp` | enforce the use of the `v` flag | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/require-unicode-sets-regexp.html) |
| 75 | `simplify-set-operations` | require simplify set operations | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/simplify-set-operations.html) |
| 76 | `sort-alternatives` | sort alternatives if order doesn't matter | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/sort-alternatives.html) |
| 77 | `sort-character-class-elements` | enforces elements order in character class | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/sort-character-class-elements.html) |
| 78 | `sort-flags` | require regex flags to be sorted | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/sort-flags.html) |
| 79 | `strict` | disallow not strictly valid regular expressions | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/strict.html) |
| 80 | `unicode-escape` | enforce consistent usage of unicode escape or unicode codepoint escape | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/unicode-escape.html) |
| 81 | `unicode-property` | enforce consistent naming of unicode properties | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/unicode-property.html) |
| 82 | `use-ignore-case` | use the `i` flag if it simplifies the pattern | [docs](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-regexp/rules/use-ignore-case.html) |
